name: Hare, Rabbit, Veal or Chicken Stew with Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 kg hare or rabbit joints (stewing veal or chicken can also be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy pan.
2. Fry the meat with the leeks and garlic until the vegetables are slightly softened and the meat is lightly browned.
3. Add the barley, water, vinegar, bay leaves, and seasoning to the pan.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer gently for 1 - 1 1/2 hours or until the meat is very tender and falls off the bone.
5. Add the sage (freshly chopped or dried) and continue cooking for several minutes.
6. Adjust the seasoning to taste and serve in bowls. The barley will act as a vegetable.
